title: Graph Analytics Platform
description: Graph database + analytics engine: property-graph storage, Cypher query engine, built-in community-detection, shortest-path, centrality algorithms, real-time graph query API. Supports Neo4j and Amazon Neptune query syntax.
features: Property-graph storage with dual indexing on node and relationship
Cypher-compatible query engine — query any connected graph reachable in 2 hops
Built-in algorithms — community detection, shortest-path, and centrality
Real-time graph query API with connection pooling and per-query SLA
benefits: Find connected threat actors across 6 degrees of separation in under 5 seconds
Recommendation engine queries execute across millions of edges with sub-10ms guarantees
Community detection finds hidden groups without supervised model
Cypher query verbosity means less SQL boilerplate for anything graph-connected

title: Image & Video Search Engine
description: Visual search as a platform: CLIP-based embedding store, vector index with Qdrant/Pinecone, OCR + object/face/scene tag per frame, timestamped search in videos, content-aware smart cropping and reflow.
features: CLIP-based embedding store with Qdrant or Pinecone vector index backend
Full OCR + object/face/scene tag per frame in every video processed
Timestamped search in video — jump to the frame where a concept appears
Content-aware smart cropping and visual reflow for multi-format output
benefits: Search catalogues of millions of images using natural language instead of keywords
Find a specific person or object across thousands of hours of footage in seconds
OCR indexing turns video into searchable text transcript gallery
Content-aware output means one reflow job publisher delivers 12 aspect ratios from one source

title: Real-time Event & Trending Aggregator
description: Streaming data platform: Flink/Redpanda backbone, windowed aggregation at sub-second latency, trend-detection anomaly alerts, opentelemetry distributed-tracing per event, dashboarding per team with live drill-through.
features: Flink + Redpanda backbone with sub-second windowed aggregation
Trend-detection + anomaly-alert engine with statistical significance scoring
Opentelemetry per event — correlate any aggregate back to source event in one click
Live dashboard with drill-through per team with RBAC on views and rows
benefits: Know what your product or your API are doing as they're happening, not the next morning
Trend-detection alerting on spikes in errors or latency catches outages before customers call
Per-event tracing means no more 'event-lost' midnight firefight
Time-limited dashboard views are the right way to share live data with stakeholders

title: Unstructured Data Lake
description: Managed object store on blob backend with auto-ingest, schema-on-read catalog with Awake-based parsing (Parquet/Delta/JSON/CSV/Avro), cost-tiered storage (hot/warm/cold), built-in PII detection, OBIEE/Looker connector.
features: Auto-ingest from S3/ADLS/GCS every 60 seconds or on demand
Schema-on-read catalog with Awakes parsing across Parquet, Delta, JSON, CSV, and Avro
Cost-tiered hot/warm/cold storage with auto-archive policy per dataset
Built-in PII detection with obfuscation or recommend per-field redact action
benefits: One platform for unstructured and structured data removes the lake/warehouse ping-pong
PII detected and flagged before anyone queries unexpectedly sensitive columns
Cost-tiered storage means you save 70%+ on cold archive retention vs. always-hot bucket
Awake-building based parsers means every file type is read correctly without ETL pipeline changes
